content: On Saturday, April 4, 2026, R:CALL — AFTERDARK | Vol.2 will be held at The Sun Rises Again in Meguro, Tokyo. AFTERDARK is a late-night session centered around foreign DJs and guest selectors moving through Tokyo. With Techno and House at its core, the event brings together different sounds, different backgrounds, and one shared floor. It is a night where distinct styles and atmospheres meet, collide, and gradually pull the room into one flow. Event Info Date: Saturday, April 4, 2026 Time: 21:00 - 05:00 Venue: The Sun Rises Again Address: 2-1-14 Gohongi, Meguro-ku, Tokyo Entrance: ¥2,000 Guest: ¥1,000 Line-up Animismusica Satoshi Maze:L Koleco Cirra Han Jake Bruno Noppa Attendees will also be eligible to receive a Soulbound Token (SBT) — a proof of presence that connects this night to the wider R:CALL Series. If you are interested, take a look here: https://ja.ra.co/events/2404188
